description_long: This is a decorative cup with a cylindrical glass body held within an ornate, dark metal holder. The metal holder features embossed floral patterns and a beaded rim at the base, giving it a vintage or classical appearance. A single, thin metal handle is attached to one side, allowing for easy gripping. The glass portion is translucent and slightly frosted, contrasting with the opaque, matte finish of the metal. The back of the holder has a vertical metal strip with rivet-like details, reinforcing the structure. This cup is both functional and ornamental, suitable for serving hot beverages in an urban café or as a collectible item.
description: A vintage-style cup with a frosted glass insert and an ornate, embossed metal holder featuring a handle and decorative patterns.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with its handle on the right and the ornate floral pattern on the metal holder clearly visible.
description_view_1: The back view highlights the vertical metal reinforcement strip with rivet details, and the handle is not visible.
description_view_2: The handle is now on the left, and the floral pattern on the metal holder is again prominent.
description_view_3: The rear of the cup is shown, displaying the full width of the floral pattern and the vertical reinforcement strip centered.
